title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Orient Electric Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Orient Electric Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Orient Electric Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Allahabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Orient Electric Ventures Solutions:
Orient Electric Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Orient Electric Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
